have been described till now in the case of male horoscopies, will apply to
females also. Matters, relating to her physical appearance, should be
th
determined from Lagn, those, relating to children, from the 5 Bhava,
th
fortune for the husband from the 7 and death of the husband (widowhood)
th
should be deduced from the 8 . Those effects, which are impossible to
ascribe to the female, should be declared to be applicable to her husband.

Brihat Jatak. “Of the effects, that have been described till now in the case
of male horoscopes and those, that may be found in female horoscopes,
suitable to females, should be declared, as applicable to them alone. The
rest should be ascribed to their husbands. The death of the husband is to
th
be deduced through the 8 place (from Lagn, or Candr, whichever is
stronger). Matters, relating to her appearance, beauty etc., should be
th
determined from Lagn and the Rāśi, occupied by Candr.
